message:
feat(storage): add skill feedback tracking (schema v9)

Add database support for tracking user feedback on skills, enabling
quality signals for the suggestion/bandit system.

## New Migration: 009_add_skill_feedback.sql

Creates skill_feedback table:
- id: TEXT PRIMARY KEY (UUID)
- skill_id: TEXT NOT NULL (FK to skills.id)
- feedback_type: TEXT NOT NULL (e.g., "helpful", "outdated", "incorrect")
- rating: INTEGER (optional numeric score)
- comment: TEXT (optional free-form feedback)
- created_at: TEXT NOT NULL (ISO 8601 timestamp)

Indexes:
- idx_skill_feedback_skill: Fast lookup by skill
- idx_skill_feedback_created: Time-series queries

## Database Methods (src/storage/sqlite.rs)

Add update_skill_deprecation() method:
- Sets is_deprecated flag and deprecation_reason
- Used by prune apply deprecate:skill command
- Enables soft-delete workflow for skills

## Schema Version

Bumps SCHEMA_VERSION from 8 to 9. Updated test assertion to match.

## Use Cases

1. User feedback loop: "ms feedback <skill> --helpful/--outdated"
2. Bandit signal integration: Feedback types as quality signals
3. Deprecation workflow: Mark skills deprecated with reason
4. Quality dashboard: Aggregate feedback for skill maintainers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+-- Add skill feedback tracking
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_feedback (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    skill_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES skills(id),
+    feedback_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    rating INTEGER,
+    comment TEXT,
+    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_feedback_skill ON skill_feedback(skill_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_feedback_created ON skill_feedback(created_at);
